page_not_found_text_1: Sorry, we couldn't find the page you're looking for.
page_not_found_text_2: It might have been moved, deleted, or you entered the wrong URL.
hero_section_title: All your files in one secure location, accessible anywhere.
hero_section_text: Fylo stores your most important files in one secure location. Access them wherever you need, share and collaborate with friends, family, and co-workers.
about_section_text1: Never let location be an issue when accessing your files. Fylo has you covered for all of your file storage needs.
about_section_text2: Securely share files and folders with friends, family and colleagues for live collaboration. No email attachments required!
about_section_quote_text: Fylo has improved our team productivity by an order of magnitude. Since making the switch our team has become a well-oiled collaboration machine.
access_section_text: It only takes a minute to sign up and our free starter tier is extremely generous. If you have any questions, our support team would be happy to help you.
